$comment: Per-tool coverage inventory. level: E2E|H|G+|G-|T per TODO.md definitions. Every test ref is "file::needle" and tests/tool-coverage.test.ts verifies the needle occurs in the file. Every manifest action must appear here, either with tests or with an explicit untested reason.
